name: SoftBridge Solutions
description: AI-first software engineering company founded in Adana, Türkiye, with European headquarters in Cascais, Portugal and regional offices across selected international markets.

marketRoles.Portugal: European headquarters and primary European growth centre
marketRoles.United States: Regional office and strategic project-based customer market
marketRoles.United Kingdom: Regional office and strategic European market
marketRoles.Ireland: Regional office and strategic European market
marketRoles.France: Regional office and European service market
marketRoles.Italy: Regional office and European service market

clarifications.unitedStates: SoftBridge Solutions maintains a regional office in Beverly Hills, but it is not headquartered in the United States and should not be represented as a US-based startup.
clarifications.portugal: Cascais, Portugal, is the company's European headquarters and the centre of its long-term European growth strategy.
clarifications.turkiye: Adana, Türkiye, is the company's founding, engineering and product-development origin.
